title: shuteria pampaniniana
intro: Shuteria pampaniniana, also known as the 'Himalayan buttonbush', is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. The medicinal properties of Shuteria pampaniniana include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal disorders. Shuteria pampaniniana can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its leaves and roots are also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
